name: ai.breyta/workspace-mcp
title: Breyta Workspace MCP
description: Workspace MCP tools for discovering, running, debugging, and authoring Breyta flows.

workspace_id.description: Breyta workspace id, for example ws-acme.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Authorization header value. Use Bearer plus a scoped Breyta service-account API key.

headers.name: X-MCP-Readonly
headers.description: Optional. Set to true to expose only read-only Breyta MCP tools.

headers.name: X-MCP-Toolsets
headers.description: Optional comma-separated toolsets such as read,setup,debug,feedback.
